headline: Merck’s New GARDASIL Data And What It May Mean For MRK Stock
summary: Merck, NYSE:MRK, is presenting new long term data on its GARDASIL 9 and GARDASIL HPV vaccines at a major international HPV congress. The data highlight vaccine effectiveness against cancers and diseases caused by HPV, alongside updated safety findings. The disclosure includes both clinical and real world evidence on the durability of protection from Merck's GARDASIL vaccine portfolio. For investors watching NYSE:MRK, this update centers on one of Merck's key vaccine franchises rather than...
